CREATE TABLE h3_data (id UInt32, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM h3_data WHERE resolution IN (0, 15);
SELECT AVG(edgeLengthKm) FROM (SELECT h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM h3_data);
SELECT h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM (SELECT resolution FROM h3_data WHERE id = 3) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE h3_data2 (id UInt32, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthKm(h3_data.resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM h3_data JOIN h3_data2 ON h3_data.resolution = h3_data2.resolution;
SELECT resolution, h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution) AS edgeLengthKm FROM h3_data WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS edgeCount, SUM(h3EdgeLengthKm(resolution)) AS totalLength FROM h3_data WHERE resolution != 0;
